scripts.build: pnpm contract:build && pnpm logger:build && pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm --dir ../.. exec tsc --project apps/api/tsconfig.build.json
scripts.dev: pnpm contract:build && pnpm logger:build && pnpm prisma:generate && NODE_OPTIONS=--conditions=development pnpm exec tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir ../.. exec oxlint apps/api/src apps/api/test apps/api/prisma
scripts.test: pnpm contract:build && pnpm logger:build && pnpm prisma:generate && NODE_OPTIONS=--conditions=development pnpm --dir ../.. exec jest --config apps/api/jest.config.ts --runInBand
scripts.typecheck: pnpm contract:build && pnpm logger:build && pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm --dir ../.. exec tsc --project apps/api/tsconfig.build.json --noEmit
